form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten this track over 1780m, 7 days ago and two back 7th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 40 m by Real Miki (2:09.80) in Up to 1 LTW on March 26 at $101. Wait until the form picks up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in contacting a marker peg nearing the 700m point of the event.
Had a tendency to over race in the run.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth after showing early speed, behind Matteo at this track over 2040m in a Up to 1 LTW on March 19 at $81. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Victree Charlie at Albion Park over 1660m in a 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 27 at $18. Can play a role in the finish again.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 18 m by Miki Moo (2:08.40) in Up to 1 LTW on April 1 at $41. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track, beaten 12 m by Highnmighty (2:10.00) in 3yo No NR on March 26 at $12. Rates highly. Draws well and could peak here.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 18 m by Amylee (2:09.40) in Up to 1 LTW on April 2 at $41. Before that, 4th (Sr2) over 1780m at this track beaten 9 m by Nite Irene (2:11.50) in Up to 1 LTW on February 18 at $21. Strong contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced at approximately 350m when Taking Stock broke gait.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 20 m by Miki Moo (2:08.40) in Up to 1 LTW on April 1 at $5. The start before 5th (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 55 m by Alwaysbjoy (1:54.00) in 2-3yo+ wins on March 24 at $15. Strong claims.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 5th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 24 m by Rosies Boy (2:00.90) in Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $21. Two runs back 5th (Sr1) over 2040m at this track beaten 45 m by Matteo (2:29.00) in Up to 1 LTW on March 19 at $34. Has the task ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait in the score up losing considerable ground.
Raced greenly in the early stages of the score up. Broke near the 1200m.
Checked rounding the first turn as a result of Hypnotize Me breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track, beaten 35 m by Real Miki (2:09.80) in Up to 1 LTW on March 26 at $23. Before that, a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Sr4) over 1850m after being wide early at Marburg beaten 9 m by Saturday Dance (2:16.80) in Up to 1 LTW on March 15 at $12. Forward performance expected.

form.formComment: Returns after five months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation recording by 1.75 m (Sr1) at this track (2:13.70) beating My Ultimate Leo in MAIDEN on November 19 at $31 at the bell was 5th-8.3m on the pegs. Keep safe fresh.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Nite Irene at this track over 1780m in a Up to 1 LTW on February 18 at $26. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second behind Miki Moo at this track over 1780m in a Up to 1 LTW on April 1 at $71. One of the key runners.
